mapper.sql: id, workspace_id, user_id, organization_id, membership_type, status, valid_from, valid_until, role_ids, data_scope_ids, revision
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pdp_workspace_membership WHERE workspace_id = #{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY user_id, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pdp_workspace_membership ( id, workspace_id, user_id, organization_id, membership_type, status, valid_from, valid_until, role_ids, data_scope_ids, revision ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{userId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{organizationId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{membershipType}, #{status}, #{validFrom,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, #{validUntil,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, #{roleIds,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, #{dataScopeIds,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, #{revision} )
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_workspace_membership SET organization_id = #{organizationId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, membership_type = #{membershipType}, status = #{status}, valid_from = #{validFrom,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, valid_until = #{validUntil,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, role_ids = #{roleIds,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, data_scope_ids = #{dataScopeIds,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, revision = #{revision} WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{revision} - 1
